task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for BMW X5 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $67600.00 and wholesale is $50000.00. Product features: Luxury mid-size SUV with xDrive all-wheel drive and luxurious cabin. Reference: https://www.bmwusa.com/vehicles/x-models/x5/sports-activity-vehicle/overview.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for BMW X5. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying BMW X5. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
